
Copy

# Potential Thrust
 
> Done-for-you GoHighLevel CRM automation agency for solo real estate agents in the Dallas–Fort Worth (DFW) area, Texas.
 
## What We Do
 
Potential Thrust builds and manages complete CRM automation systems on the GoHighLevel (GHL) platform. We handle everything — setup, configuration, workflows, integrations, and ongoing support — so real estate agents and small business owners can focus on closing deals, not managing software.
 
We specialize in helping solo and independent real estate agents who are losing leads because they are too busy to follow up fast enough.
 
## Services
 
### Real Estate Agents (Primary Market)
 
- **Launch Package** — Full GHL sub-account setup: lead pipeline, automated follow-up sequences, missed-call text-back, appointment booking via Calendly integration, and lead scoring powered by AI (OpenAI). Ideal for agents just getting started with CRM automation.
- **Accelerate Package** — Everything in Launch, plus advanced nurture sequences, multi-channel outreach (SMS + email), and custom workflow logic tailored to the agent's sales process.
- **Dominate Package** — Full done-for-you system including AI lead scoring, priority routing, reporting dashboards, and dedicated ongoing support.
 
### HVAC & Trades (Secondary Market — DFW)
 
- **Rapid Launch Package** — $500, delivered in 48 hours. Includes: GHL pipeline setup, missed-call text-back, email follow-up sequence, and calendar/appointment integration. Built specifically for solo HVAC owner-operators and small trades businesses (1–3 technicians) who miss inbound calls and lose jobs to competitors.
 
## Who We Help
 
- Solo real estate agents in the Dallas–Fort Worth metro area
- Independent HVAC contractors and small trades businesses in DFW (1–3 technicians)
- Business owners who use or want to use GoHighLevel CRM but need someone to set it up and manage it
 
## Technology Stack
 
- GoHighLevel (GHL) — CRM, pipelines, SMS, email, automation workflows
- OpenAI (GPT-4o-mini) — AI lead scoring and priority routing
- Calendly — Appointment booking integration
- SMS (Dallas number: +1 469-461-7865)
- Missed-call text-back automation (native GHL)
- Custom webhook integrations
 
## Location & Market
 
- Agency: India-based, serving US clients remotely
- Primary service area: Dallas–Fort Worth, Texas (all DFW submarkets)
- Works with US-based real estate agents and small businesses
 
## Why Potential Thrust
 
- Done-for-you — no technical knowledge required from the client
- AI-powered lead scoring so agents know exactly which leads to call first
- Speed-to-lead automation: new leads get an instant follow-up within minutes, not hours
- Missed-call text-back: every missed call gets an automatic SMS response so no lead is lost
- Fast turnaround: HVAC Rapid Launch delivered in 48 hours
- Specialized in GoHighLevel — not a generalist agency
 
## Contact & Links
 
- Website: https://potentialthrust.com
- Email: hello@potentialthrust.com
- Book a call: https://calendly.com/hello-potentialthrust/30min
 
## Frequently Asked Questions
 
**Do I need to know how GoHighLevel works?**
No. We handle everything. You just need to show up for the onboarding call and we take it from there.
 
**How long does setup take?**
The HVAC Rapid Launch Package is delivered in 48 hours. Real estate packages typically take 3–5 business days for full setup.
 
**Do you offer ongoing support?**
Yes. Higher-tier packages include ongoing management and support.
 
**What is lead scoring?**
We use AI to automatically score every inbound lead based on their behavior and responses, so you always know which leads are hot and should be called first.
 
**Can you help me if I already have a GHL account?**
Yes. We can work within your existing GHL account or set up a fresh sub-account.
 
**What if I miss a call?**
Our missed-call text-back automation sends an instant SMS to the caller so you never lose a lead to a missed call again.
